overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza transitioning into a covered pedestrian walkway. The scene features neon-lit modern architecture, holographic advertisements, and diverse pedestrians in a high-density urban environment at dusk, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with wide terraced stairs and modern architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open plaza toward wide terraced stairs

notable_agents.action: character with purple hair and white top walking down the stairs

entered.detail: Wide concrete stairs with multiple levels serving as seating and circulation
Large illuminated 'M' logo on dark building facade
Rectangular planter with trees and greenery
Large blank white rectangular screens mounted on building facade
Modern glass and steel high-rise building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open urban plaza at dusk, approaching wide terraced stairs. The M building sign dominates the background while pedestrians sit on the steps. Modern glass architecture and white billboard structures frame the scene with moderate greenery from planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced seating area transitioning to upper pedestrian walkway

events.description: ascending from plaza level to upper walkway, leaving open area
continuing up stairs past various pedestrians moving in opposing directions

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stairs past seated and standing pedestrians, transitioning to upper level

notable_agents.action: character in business attire with briefcase walking down stairs
character with neon green pants and white jacket walking up stairs

entered.detail: Opening leading to covered pedestrian walkway with structural columns
Modern benches with people seated along the right side
Tall hedge row running along the walkway edge
Concrete support columns for overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the terraced stairs, transitioning from the open plaza to an upper walkway. The M building sign recedes to the left as structural columns and park benches come into view. Pedestrians move in opposing directions on the stairs, and the environment becomes increasingly sheltered.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with yellow structural beams and digital advertising

events.description: entering covered walkway with prominent yellow structural beams and overhead bridge
ambient light decreases significantly as moving deeper under the covered structure

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway passing pedestrians seated on benches and others walking

notable_agents.action: character in red dress walking toward camera
character in yellow plaid shirt walking past camera

entered.detail: Prominent yellow structural I-beams supporting the overhead walkway
Elevated walkway bridge crossing above the main path with yellow trim
Large illuminated digital billboards displaying advertisements
Transparent glass safety railings along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway characterized by distinctive yellow structural beams and an overhead bridge. Digital advertising screens illuminate the left side while pedestrians occupy benches on the right. The lighting shifts to artificial as the open sky disappears, replaced by the covered roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered walkway with neon advertising and wet pavement reflections

events.description: transition to darker environment with prominent neon lighting and reflective wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing through dimly lit covered walkway with neon reflections visible on the ground

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward camera in the distance

entered.detail: Dark solid roof structure blocking all sky visibility
Bright neon advertising screens casting colored light on surroundings
Reflective wet ground surface showing neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds into a darker section of the covered walkway where yellow structural elements give way to a darker roof. Neon-lit billboards cast vibrant colored light onto the wet reflective pavement. The environment feels more enclosed and nocturnal, with pedestrians visible as silhouettes against the neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, dusk-lit urban plaza into a sheltered, neon-drenched pedestrian corridor. It begins by gliding through the plaza toward wide terraced stairs, framed by modern glass architecture and a dominating M building sign. As the camera ascends the stairs, the open sky begins to recede and the environment becomes increasingly sheltered, shifting past structural columns and park benches. The scene then opens into a covered walkway defined by yellow structural beams and digital advertising screens, where the natural light of dusk is replaced by artificial illumination. Finally, the camera proceeds into a darker, more enclosed section of the walkway, where the yellow beams give way to a dark roof and vibrant neon billboards cast colorful reflections onto the wet pavement.
